basic_details.job_title: DPS Nalconagar Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 31 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Delhi Public School Nalconagar (DPS Nalconagar) has published the Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff Notification 2026 on 22 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 31 Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 45 years and holding relevant qualifications such as Post-Graduate/Graduate degrees in the respective subjects with B.Ed./NTT and OSSTET/CTET (Paper II) where applicable can apply Online at www.dpsnalconagar.org. The application process will be active from 22 May 2026 to 05 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF an

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 01-05-2026. Relaxation in age limit may be considered for the experienced candidates (preferably working in CBSE affiliated school).

qualification.education_qualification: Post- Graduate / Graduate in relevant discipline with B.Ed./NTT and OSSTET/CTET (Paper II) where applicable. Specific qualifications vary by post.
qualification.details: English: Post-Graduate / Graduate in English from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Hindi: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Hindi from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Mathematics: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Mathematics from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Science (Physics): Post-Graduate / Graduate in Physics from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Geography: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Geography / Political Science from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Computer Science: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Computer Science / MCA from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. Odia: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Odia with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. from a recognized university with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Sanskrit: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Sanskrit with minimum 50% With B.Ed from recognized university with OSSTET/ CTET (Paper-II). Science (Biology): Post-Graduate / Graduate in Biology with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. from a recognized university with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Economics: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Economic with minimum 50% marks and B.Ed. from a recognized university with OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Physical Education (PET): Post-Graduate / Graduate (M.P.Ed/B. P. Ed.) from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks and OSSTET / CTET (Paper II). Balvatika: Post-Graduate / Graduate in any discipline with minimum 50% marks and NTT/B.Ed. from a recognized university with OSSTET/CTET (Paper II). Dance: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Dance with minimum 50% marks from a recognized university. Art & Craft: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Drawing and Painting /Fine Arts with minimum 50% marks from a recognized university. Music Vocal: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Music with minimum 50% marks from a recognized university. Music Instrument: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Music with minimum 50% marks from a recognized university. Junior Accountant: Post-Graduate / Graduate in Commerce with minimum 50% from a recognized university. Preferably CA / ICWA intermediate qualified. Office Assistant: Post-Graduate / Graduate in any discipline with minimum 50% from a recognized university.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DPS Nalconagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through Online mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dpsnalconagar.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DPS Nalconagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of offline application forms for the DPS Nalconagar Recruitment 2026 is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 31 vacancies available for Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff positions at Delhi Public School Nalconagar (DPS Nalconagar) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the DPS Nalconagar recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years as of 01 May 2026. Age relaxation may be provided for experienced candidates, particularly those working in CBSE affiliated schools.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for DPS Nalconagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the DPS Nalconagar Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post. Generally, candidates need a Post-Graduate or Graduate degree in the relevant subject with a minimum of 50% marks and B.Ed. or NTT, along with OSSTET/CTET (Paper II) for teaching positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 35,400/- per month, depending on the specific post. Office Assistants will receive Rs. 25,500/- per month, while most teaching positions offer Rs. 35,400/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DPS Nalconagar Recruitment 2026 includes a Written Test, followed by a Demo and an Interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Delhi Public School Nalconagar, which is www.dpsnalconagar.org.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for the Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff positions at DPS Nalconagar is contractual.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DPS Nalconagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of offline application forms for the DPS Nalconagar Recruitment 2026 is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.
